name: Sayur Goreng (Sauteed Mixed Vegetables)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 onion, 4 shallots, and 2 garlic cloves in a food processor. Pulse until a smooth paste forms.
2. Cut the cauliflower into florets, slice the carrots, chiles, and green bell pepper, and cut the yard-long beans into short lengths.
3. Heat 1/4 cup oil in a large pan over medium heat.
4. Add the onion paste to the pan and sauté for three to four minutes until fragrant.
5. Add the cauliflower florets, carrots, chiles, green bell pepper pieces, baby corn, and yard-long beans to the pan. Stir-fry for five to six minutes until the vegetables are tender-crisp.
6. Stir in 1/3 cup catsup and 1/3 cup chili sauce. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Continue cooking for two to three more minutes, stirring frequently, until the sauce has thickened slightly.
8. Serve immediately.
